title: Stabilize Loosefruit gateway and mapping
description: Create or repair the Loosefruit Query Gateway repository for PR_LOOSEFRUIT duplicate target discovery. Resolve current duplicate/incomplete ownership between app/core/loosefruit_gateway.py and app/core/task_register_gateway.py.
convergence: Loosefruit gateway imports without syntax/runtime errors.
list_duplicate_doc_ids supports loc_code, acc_month, acc_year, limit.
Blank loc_code means all locations and does not add LocCode predicate.
SQL uses PR_LOOSEFRUIT, SELECT TOP, user-provided columns, and DocID LIKE '%[_]%'.
Rows map to DuplicateDocIdTarget with category loosefruit, source loosefruit-pr-loosefruit, action DELETE_RECORD.
